subject: [COMMON] Fix handling affinity block for mariadb-galera
commit_message:
[COMMON] Fix handling affinity block for mariadb-galera

fix matchExpressions under nodeSelectorTerms to indicating
array construct.
there is no helm tpl defined with common.tplvalues, fixing
it to use common.tplValue

Issue-ID: OOM-2800
Signed-off-by: Prabhjot Singh Sethi <prabhjot@aarnanetworks.com>
Change-Id: I572ee30af745aa7f10c8438ea9516534e71d5acd

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2984/ )
